rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE NARRON FAMILY TRUST DATED 4/22/1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 2, 2013, Line 1, PETITIONER LISA DEJOHN'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. Continued to May 8, 2013 on the Court's motion. = (302/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE CARLOS AND MARTA P. RAMIREZ 1996 REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Cres Ramirez'S Notice Of Hearing And Demurrer To Petitioner Fe Thibodeaux'S Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Trustees; ...
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer Motion is sustained without prejudice. Petition must be verified as rquired by Probate Code 1021(a)(1). Amended petition must be verified, notice to all parties and filed with the court within 10 days. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify the court (415 551 3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on May 1, 2013. If the tentative ruling is not argued, it will become the ordr of the court. Prevailing party to prepare the order.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE CARLOS AND MARTA P. RAMIREZ 1996 REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent M. Rameriz'S Notice Of Hearing And Demurrer To Petition And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities.
rulings.Rulings: Demuurer Motion is sustained without prejudice. Petition is not verified as required by Probate Code 102(a)(1). Amended Petition must be verified, notice to all parties and filed with the court within 10 days. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify the court (415 551 3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on May 1, 2013. If the tentative ruling is not argued, it will become the order of the court. Prevailing party to prepare the order.
